info.excerpt: Disables the output stream for this socket.

java.net/NetworkInterface/subInterfaces.name: subInterfaces
java.net/NetworkInterface/subInterfaces.description:
Get a Stream of all subinterfaces (also known as virtual
interfaces) attached to this network interface.

info.excerpt:
Get a Stream of all subinterfaces (also known as virtual
interfaces) attached to this network interface.

java.net/Socket/supportedOptions.name: supportedOptions
java.net/Socket/supportedOptions.description: Returns a set of the socket options supported by this socket.

info.excerpt: Returns a set of the socket options supported by this socket.

java.net/ServerSocket/supportedOptions.name: supportedOptions
java.net/ServerSocket/supportedOptions.description: Returns a set of the socket options supported by this server socket.

info.excerpt: Returns a set of the socket options supported by this server socket.

java.net/DatagramSocket/supportedOptions.name: supportedOptions
java.net/DatagramSocket/supportedOptions.description: Returns a set of the socket options supported by this socket.

java.net/DatagramSocketImpl/supportedOpt.name: supportedOptions
java.net/DatagramSocketImpl/supportedOpt.description:
Returns a set of SocketOptions supported by this impl
and by this impl's socket (DatagramSocket or MulticastSocket)

info.excerpt:
Returns a set of SocketOptions supported by this impl

java.net/SocketImpl/supportedOptions.name: supportedOptions
java.net/SocketImpl/supportedOptions.description:
Returns a set of SocketOptions supported by this impl
and by this impl's socket (Socket or ServerSocket)

info.excerpt:
Returns a set of SocketOptions supported by this impl

java.net/NetworkInterface/supportsMultic.name: supportsMulticast
java.net/NetworkInterface/supportsMultic.description: Returns whether a network interface supports multicasting or not.

info.excerpt: Returns whether a network interface supports multicasting or not.

java.net/SocketImpl/supportsUrgentData.name: supportsUrgentData
